query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @custID nvarchar(64), @vcID varchar(33), @c varchar(33), @m varchar(33), @i varchar(33) select @custID = '%#10$' + rtrim(@ma_kh) + '#%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end select @vcID = case when @type = '1' then 'HM1' when @type = '2' then 'HMA' else 'HMB' end select @i = case when @type = '1' then 'i71$' when @type = '2' then 'i72$' else 'i78$' end select @m = replace(@i, 'i', 'm'), @c = replace(@i, 'i', 'c') + '000000'
exec MaxvOnline$App$Voucher$Finding @vcID, @c, @m, @i, 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt', '', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1, 2', '0', @unit
